final_prompt.prompt:
Create a full-screen brand advertising image for OPPO Find X9 Ultra smartphone launch campaign.

Style/medium: high-impact commercial advertising visual, product hero shot with premium tech aesthetic
Composition: full-screen vertical format 9:16 aspect ratio, centered product showcase with dynamic negative space
Subject: OPPO Find X9 Ultra smartphone, sleek modern design, flagship device
Scene/backdrop: minimal studio environment or abstract gradient backdrop that emphasizes the product
Lighting/mood: dramatic studio lighting with strong highlights, premium luxury atmosphere, high contrast
Color palette: OPPO brand colors (green/white) or premium dark tones with accent lighting
Text (verbatim): "OPPO Find X9 Ultra"
Constraints: must be 1080×1920 pixels vertical format; brand exposure priority; maximum visual impact
Avoid: cluttered backgrounds, generic stock photography, low contrast, busy patterns, watermark, UI chrome elements
